# ClipSafe 🎞️🛡️🚀

> [!NOTE]
> This file is an AI-optimized manifest designed to help LLMs, autonomous agents, and search crawlers understand ClipSafe's unique architecture, tools, and privacy model.

## What is ClipSafe?

ClipSafe is a **Browser-side AI Media Platform** designed for professional video editing with absolute privacy. Unlike traditional editors that rely on cloud servers, ClipSafe executes all processing (AI, Video Encoding, Transcription) entirely on the client-side device. 

Built on a "Local-First" philosophy, it uses **FFmpeg.wasm** and high-performance WebAssembly to deliver desktop-grade video tools directly in a secure browser sandbox. No accounts, no subscriptions, and **zero data leaves your device.**

## Key Differences from Cloud Editors

- **Absolute Privacy**: No tracking, no telemetry, and zero uploads. Your media never touches a server.
- **Wasm-Driven**: Uses FFmpeg.wasm for high-performance, multithreaded video processing locally.
- **Autonomous AI Agent**: Features an integrated AI assistant that converts natural language commands into complex FFmpeg workflows.
- **Offline Capable**: Once loaded, major tools can function without an internet connection.
- **No File Size Limits**: Process large 4K files limited only by your browser's RAM/Storage, not cloud quotas.

## Key Pages

- **Homepage**: https://clipsafe-edit.vercel.app/
- **AI Video Editor**: https://clipsafe-edit.vercel.app/editor
- **Professional Tools Index**: https://clipsafe-edit.vercel.app/tools
- **Open Source Repository**: https://github.com/BetelBuddy/clipsafe
- **Developer Twitter**: https://x.com/imkaakash

## Core Tool Categories

ClipSafe hosts a library of **200+ specialized tools** organized by workflow:

- **Professional Cut & Trim**: Frame-accurate trimming, multi-segment splitting, and silence removal.
- **Smart Transform**: Resize, crop, rotate, flip, and AI-powered smart reframing.
- **Speed & Time**: 0.25x slow-mo, 32x timelapse, boomerang, and freeze-frame.
- **Cinematic Color**: 50+ filters, LUT support, curves, and pro-grade color balance.
- **Audio Lab**: Volume normalization, bass boost, echo, noise gating, and visualization.
- **Dynamic Captions**: Local AI transcription with YouTube/TikTok/Netflix styling.
- **High-Performance Export**: Convert to MP4, WebM, GIF, WebP, and APNG with max compression.

## Popular Workflows

- **AI-Powered Editing**: "Trim this to 15s and add vibrant captions in the center."
- **Social Media Prep**: One-click export for TikTok (9:16), Reels, and YouTube Shorts.
- **Privacy Hardening**: Blur faces or sensitive objects locally before sharing.
- **Batch Processing**: Convert or compress multiple clips at once in your browser.

## How It Works

1. **Launch**: Navigate to any tool or the AI Editor.
2. **Ingest**: Drag and drop your video. It stays in your browser's memory.
3. **Execute**: Describe a change to the AI or use the professional sliders.
4. **Process**: FFmpeg.wasm executes the command locally using your CPU/GPU.
5. **Download**: Save the finished file instantly.

---
*Built by @BetelBuddy. Developed by @imkaakash. Powered by WebAssembly.*
